zh.lifeSummary: 當James Butler 4th Earl of Ormond於1392年5月28日出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 基爾堅尼基爾堅尼時，他的父親James Boteler 3rd Earl of Ormond29歲，母親Anne Welles32歲。他於1413年8月28日與Joan de Beauchamp在英國格盧斯特斯爾金也斯 斯坦利結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1452年8月23日在愛爾蘭庫迪 盧斯阿爾迪享年60歲，埋葬在愛爾蘭庫迪 度布林度布林。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当James Butler 4th Earl of Ormond于1392年5月28日出生在爱尔兰庫迪 基爾堅尼基爾堅尼时，他的父亲James Boteler 3rd Earl of Ormond29岁，母亲Anne Welles32岁。他于1413年8月28日与Joan de Beauchamp在英国格盧斯特斯爾金也斯 斯坦利结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1452年8月23日在爱尔兰庫迪 盧斯阿爾迪享年60岁，埋葬在爱尔兰庫迪 度布林度布林。

nameMeanings.name: Butler
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from a word that originally denoted a wine steward, usually the chief servant of a medieval household, from Norman French butuiller (Old French bouteillier, Latin buticularius, from buticula ‘bottle’). In the large households of royalty and the most powerful nobility, the title came to denote an officer of high rank and responsibility, only nominally concerned with the supply of wine, if at all. As well as being widespread in England, this is also the surname of an important Irish family, descended from Theobald FitzWalter, who was appointed Chief Butler of Ireland by King Henry II in 1177. It is Gaelicized as de Buitléir.

English: occasionally perhaps an occupational name from Middle English boteler ‘maker of bottles (usually of leather)’, a derivative of Middle English botel, Old French bo(u)teille ‘bottle’ and synonymous with Botelmaker.
Americanized form of French   Bouthillier   (see   Bouteiller  ).

variants.name: Buttler
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Butler  .
German: occupational name for a village tavern owner, from French bouteillier ‘butler’.
Americanized form of German Buttlar: habitational name from a place so named in Thuringia.

variants.name: Bouthillier
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Armand, Jacques, Normand, Philippe, Yves.
French: variant of   Bouteiller  . This name is sometimes Americanized as   Butler  . Compare   Boutilier  .

nameMeanings.name: James
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name borne in the New Testament by two of Christ's disciples, James son of Zebedee and James son of Alphaeus. This form comes from Late Latin Iacomus, a variant of Iacobus, Latin form of Greek Iakobos. This is the same name as Old Testament Jacob (Hebrew Yaakov), but for many centuries now they have been thought of in the English-speaking world as two distinct names. In Britain, James is a royal name that from the beginning of the 15th century onwards was associated particularly with the Scottish house of Stewart: James I of Scotland ( 1394–1437 ; ruled 1424–37 ) was a patron of the arts and a noted poet, as well as an energetic ruler. King James VI of Scotland ( 1566–1625 ; reigned 1567–1625 ) succeeded to the throne of England in 1603 . His grandson, James II of England ( 1633–1701 ; reigned 1685–8 ) was a Roman Catholic, deposed in 1688 in favour of his Protestant daughter Mary and her husband William of Orange. From then on he, his son (also called James), and his grandson Charles (‘Bonnie Prince Charlie’) made various unsuccessful attempts to recover the English throne. Their supporters were known as Jacobites (from Latin Iacobus), and the name James became for a while particularly associated with Roman Catholicism on the one hand, and Highland opposition to the English government on the other. Nevertheless, it has since become one of the most perennially popular boys' names.

en.lifeSummary: When James Butler 4th Earl of Ormond was born on 28 May 1392, in Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Ireland, his father, James Boteler 3rd Earl of Ormond, was 29 and his mother, Anne Welles, was 32. He married Joan de Beauchamp on 28 August 1413, in King's Stanley, Gloucestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 23 August 1452, in Ardee, County Louth, Ireland, at the age of 60, and was buried in Dublin, County Dublin, Ireland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque James Butler 4th Earl of Ormond est né le 28 mai 1392, à Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Irlande, son père, James Boteler 3rd Earl of Ormond, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Anne Welles, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Joan de Beauchamp le 28 août 1413, à King's Stanley, Gloucestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 23 août 1452, à Ardee, County Louth, Irlande, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterré à Dublin, County Dublin, Irlande.

de.lifeSummary: Als James Butler 4th Earl of Ormond am 28. Mai 1392 in Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Irland geboren wurde, war sein Vater James Boteler 3rd Earl of Ormond 29 und seine Mutter Anne Welles 32. Er hat am 28. August 1413 in King's Stanley, Gloucestershire, England Joan de Beauchamp geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 23. August 1452 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Ardee, County Louth, Irland und wurde in Dublin, County Dublin, Irland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando James Butler 4th Earl of Ormond è nato il il 28 maggio 1392 nel Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Irlanda, il suo padre, James Boteler 3rd Earl of Ormond, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Anne Welles, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Joan de Beauchamp il 28 agosto 1413, nel King's Stanley, Gloucestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 23 agosto 1452, nel Ardee, County Louth, Irlanda, all'età di 60 anni, e fu sepolto a Dublin, County Dublin, Irlanda.

ja.lifeSummary: James Butler 4th Earl of Ormondが1392年5月28日にアイルランドコウントイ キルケニーキルケニーで生まれた時，父James Boteler 3rd Earl of Ormondは29歳，母Anne Wellesは32歳であった。1413年8月28日にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアキング'ス スタンリーでJoan de Beauchampと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1452年8月23日にアイルランドコウントイ ロウスアルディーで60歳で死去し，アイルランドコウントイ ダブリンダブリンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: James Butler 4th Earl of Ormond(이)가 1392년 5월 28일 아일랜드 카운티 킬켄이 킬켄이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 James Boteler 3rd Earl of Ormond(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Anne Welles(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1413년 8월 28일 영국 그루스스터실르 킨그'스 스탠리에서 Joan de Beauchamp(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1452년 8월 23일 아일랜드 카운티 루스 아디에서 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 아일랜드 카운티 드블린 드블린에 묻혔다.

mn.28 May 1392–23 August 1452: 1392 оны Тавдугаар сарын 28–1452 оны Наймдугаар сарын 23

pt.28 May 1392–23 August 1452: 28 de maio de 1392–23 de agosto de 1452
pt.lifeSummary: Quando James Butler 4th Earl of Ormond nasceu em 28 de maio de 1392, em Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Irlanda, seu pai, James Boteler 3rd Earl of Ormond, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Anne Welles, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan de Beauchamp em 28 de agosto de 1413, em King's Stanley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 23 de agosto de 1452, em Ardee, County Louth, Irlanda, com 60 anos, e foi sepultado em Dublin, County Dublin, Irlanda.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда James Butler 4th Earl of Ormond родился 28 мая 1392 г. в местности килкенни, коунти килкенни, Ирландия, его отцу по имени James Boteler 3rd Earl of Ormond было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne Welles, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan de Beauchamp 28 августа 1413 г. в местности кинг'с стэнли, глоусестиршир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 23 августа 1452 г. в местности арди, коунти лоут, Ирландия в возрасте 60 лет и был похоронен в местности дублинь, коунти дублинь, Ирландия.

es.28 May 1392–23 August 1452: 28 de mayo de 1392–23 de agosto de 1452
es.lifeSummary: Cuando James Butler 4th Earl of Ormond nació el 28 de mayo de 1392, en Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Irlanda, su papá, James Boteler 3rd Earl of Ormond, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Anne Welles, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Joan de Beauchamp el 28 de agosto de 1413, en King's Stanley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 23 de agosto de 1452, en Ardee, County Louth, Irlanda, a la edad de 60 años, y fue sepultado en Dublin, County Dublin, Irlanda.
